title: Global myopia prevalence (percent of world population)

source.name: Global prevalence of myopia and high myopia
source.publisher: World Health Organization / Holden et al. 2016

notes: Illustrative; based on Holden et al. (2016) Ophthalmology projections and WHO global estimates. 2020 figure: ~34% (2.6 billion people). 2030 and 2050 values are modeled projections.
